# zerotrust

> Zero Trust Authentication for Modern Apps. Enterprise-grade authentication for modern applications: PASETO tokens, WebAuthn passkeys, MFA, RBAC, and more.

zerotrust is a self-hostable authentication platform with a Node/Hono REST API and a Next.js dashboard. It provides end-user auth flows (password, magic link, OAuth, SAML SSO, passkeys), multi-factor authentication, session and device management, organizations with role-based access control, API keys, webhooks, Stripe billing, GDPR tooling, and login-anomaly detection.

## Authentication

- [Login](/login): Sign in with email/password, magic link, OAuth, or a passkey.
- [Register](/register): Create a new account.
- [Magic link](/magic-link): Passwordless sign-in via a one-time email link.
- [Forgot password](/forgot-password): Request a password-reset email.
- [Reset password](/reset-password): Set a new password from a reset link.
- [Accept invite](/invite/[token]): Join an organization from an invitation link.

## Dashboard

- [Dashboard](/dashboard): Account overview and recent activity.
- [Profile](/dashboard/profile): Manage display name, avatar, and contact details.
- [Account](/dashboard/account): Account settings and data/privacy controls.
- [Security](/dashboard/security): Configure MFA (TOTP), passkeys (WebAuthn), and password.
- [Sessions](/dashboard/sessions): View and revoke active sessions across devices.
- [API keys](/dashboard/api-keys): Create and revoke programmatic API keys.
- [Webhooks](/dashboard/webhooks): Subscribe to and manage event webhooks.
- [Billing](/dashboard/billing): Manage subscription plans and Stripe billing.
- [Organizations](/dashboard/organizations): Create organizations, invite members, and assign roles.
- [Settings](/dashboard/settings): User preferences and configuration.

## Capabilities

- Authentication methods: password, magic link, OAuth providers, SAML SSO, and WebAuthn passkeys.
- Multi-factor authentication: TOTP authenticator apps and backup codes.
- Tokens: stateless PASETO access tokens with server-side session tracking and revocation.
- Access control: organizations, members, invitations, and role-based access control (RBAC).
- Account security: login-anomaly detection, geo/temporal access policies, and account-takeover protection.
- Operations: rate limiting, audit logs, GDPR export/deletion, and Stripe-backed billing lifecycle.

## Admin

- [Admin](/admin): Administrative dashboard for user management, settings, and revenue/analytics tooling (restricted to admins).

## Info

- [Status](/status): Live service and component health.
- [Changelog](/changelog): Product updates and release notes.
- [Help](/help): Support and documentation.

## Optional

- [Privacy policy](/privacy): How user data is collected and handled.
- [Terms of service](/terms): Terms governing use of the service.
